title: audit4me coverage (v1)
description: Per-file audit coverage state. Lives at .code4me/audit4me/audit-coverage.json. Top-level keys are project-relative file paths; values describe what's been audited at the current content hash, by which vendors, in which categories, when, and against which rules version. Derivable from audit-events.jsonl but cached here for fast /audit4me-status queries.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the file's current contents at the time of the most recent audit pass. Compared against the current file hash to detect content-change re-audit triggers.

vendors.description: Per-vendor audit state. Vendor keys are 'anthropic', 'openai', 'deepseek'. Absence of a vendor key means that vendor has not audited this file at the current hash.

rules_version_at_audit.description: rules_version from audit4me-config.json at the time of the most recent audit. Compared against current rules_version to detect rule-version-change re-audit triggers.

coverage_level.description: Computed from vendors_available (in config) and per-vendor audited_hash == content_hash. uncovered=0 vendors at current hash; single-vendor=1; agreement-covered=>=2; full-covered=all vendors_available. agreement-covered and full-covered coincide when vendors_available is exactly 2.

last_updated.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent vendor audit pass for this file. Equal to the max of vendors[*].audited_at.

audited_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this vendor completed its audit pass on this file.

audited_hash.description: Content hash of the file at audit time. Stale if != file's current content_hash.

categories_covered.description: Audit categories this vendor ran on this file in its most recent pass. Coverage is per-category — a file can be 'agreement-covered' for bugs but 'uncovered' for performance.

findings_count.description: Number of findings this vendor produced for this file in its most recent pass. Zero is a valid value (vendor audited and found nothing).

model.description: Resolved model identifier used for this audit pass (e.g., 'claude-sonnet-4-6', 'gpt-5.4', 'deepseek-v4-pro').
